Ajang Ajang group.description: A cell within the terrorist organization Abu Sayyaf, active in the southern Philippines. The group specialized in bomb attacks and claimed responsibility for the 2019 Jolo Cathedral bombings. The name means 'orphans' in Tausug, reflecting members who lost loved ones due to war.

descriptions: Ajang Ajang group is a cell within Abu Sayyaf.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ajang Ajang group (...) was a cell within the terrorist organization Abu Sayyaf.

descriptions: Ajang Ajang group's bombs carried the signature of Islamic State, indicating affiliation.
edges.evidence_quote: The two bombs carried the signature of the Ajang Ajang's elders, Islamic State.

descriptions: Atomwaffen members sought training with Russian Imperial Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen members also sought to train with the Azov Battalion and Russian Imperial Movement.

descriptions: Atomwaffen Division received military training from Russian Imperial Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: It received military training from the Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: Russian Imperial Movement provided paramilitary training to Finnish neo-Nazis, including Atomwaffen members.
edges.evidence_quote: In addition to Azov, the Russian Imperial Movement had also provided paramilitary training to the Finnish neo-Nazis.

descriptions: Russian Imperial Movement is listed as an ally of The Base in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Atomwaffen Division, Green Brigade, Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: Founding members of Wagner are members of the Russian Imperial Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Some founding members of Wagner belong to the far-right ultranationalist Russian Imperial Movement.

descriptions: Cappello has an alliance with Piacenti-Ceusi.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella città di Catania l'alleanza stipulata varia da molte cosche: ... Piacenti-Ceusi

'Ndrina Condello.description: The 'Ndrina Condello is a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Villa San Giovanni, and Fiumara, Italy. It is involved in drug and arms trafficking, contract rigging, and extortion rackets. The clan was led by Pasquale Condello until his arrest in 2008, and later by Domenico Condello until his arrest in 2012. It participated in the Second 'Ndrangheta war against the De Stefano clan.

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Condello in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Barreca sought to reestablish an alliance with Condello after earlier conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Peppì Barreca's strategic objective included reestablishing alliances with the influential 'ndrine from Reggio Calabria, such as the De Stefano-Tegano, Condello, and Libri families.

descriptions: The Bruzzise joined the Parrello-Condello side in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello a cui si aggiungono anche i Bruzzise

descriptions: 'Ndrina Condello is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Condello è una potentissima cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Condello killed Paolo De Stefano in retaliation for the car bomb.
edges.evidence_quote: Due giorni dopo, si scatenò l'eclatante riposta con il duplice omicidio di don Paolino De Stefano e dell'autista Antonio Pellicanò, di cui Condello e il fratello Domenico furono esecutori.

descriptions: Condello's faction was allied with the Fontana clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: Condello and Gallico were in conflict in the Palmi feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Palmi : scoppiata nel 1977 tra i Condello e i Gallico e durata più di un ventennio.

descriptions: Condello and Imerti were targeted together in the same police operation.
edges.evidence_quote: 19 novembre 2016: operazione Sansone 2 contro i Condello e gli Imerti

descriptions: Condello's faction was allied with the Imerti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti

descriptions: Condello and Libri were involved together in money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: vengono sequestrati beni ... a due imprenditori accusati di avere riciclato e fatto da prestanome alle cosche Tegano , Condello e Libri

descriptions: Members of Condello and Rosmini were arrested together in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: i carabinieri compiono 42 arresti ... nei confronti di presunti esponenti dei Condello, e ... i Rosmini

descriptions: Condello's faction was allied with the Rosmini clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: Condello's faction was allied with the Saraceno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: The Gullo were allied with the Parrello-Condello faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: mentre per la seconda: gli Iemma, i Merlino, i Gullo, i Papasergi, i Papaianni e alcuni esponenti dei Porpiglia, Celi, Anastasio, Crucitti, Zirino, Riotto, Cristofaro e Fameli

descriptions: The Iemma were allied with the Parrello-Condello faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: mentre per la seconda: gli Iemma, i Merlino, i Gullo, i Papasergi, i Papaianni e alcuni esponenti dei Porpiglia, Celi, Anastasio, Crucitti, Zirino, Riotto, Cristofaro e Fameli

descriptions: The Merlino were allied with the Parrello-Condello faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: mentre per la seconda: gli Iemma, i Merlino, i Gullo, i Papasergi, i Papaianni e alcuni esponenti dei Porpiglia, Celi, Anastasio, Crucitti, Zirino, Riotto, Cristofaro e Fameli

descriptions: The Papaianni were allied with the Parrello-Condello faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: mentre per la seconda: gli Iemma, i Merlino, i Gullo, i Papasergi, i Papaianni e alcuni esponenti dei Porpiglia, Celi, Anastasio, Crucitti, Zirino, Riotto, Cristofaro e Fameli

descriptions: The Papasergi were allied with the Parrello-Condello faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: mentre per la seconda: gli Iemma, i Merlino, i Gullo, i Papasergi, i Papaianni e alcuni esponenti dei Porpiglia, Celi, Anastasio, Crucitti, Zirino, Riotto, Cristofaro e Fameli

descriptions: Some members of the Porpiglia were allied with the Parrello-Condello faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: mentre per la seconda: gli Iemma, i Merlino, i Gullo, i Papasergi, i Papaianni e alcuni esponenti dei Porpiglia, Celi, Anastasio, Crucitti, Zirino, Riotto, Cristofaro e Fameli

descriptions: Some members of the Zirino were allied with the Parrello-Condello faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: mentre per la seconda: gli Iemma, i Merlino, i Gullo, i Papasergi, i Papaianni e alcuni esponenti dei Porpiglia, Celi, Anastasio, Crucitti, Zirino, Riotto, Cristofaro e Fameli

descriptions: De Stefano fought Condello in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: La risposta non si fece attendere: 2 giorni dopo, il 13 ottobre 1985 avviene il duplice omicidio del boss Paolo De Stefano e l'autista Antonio Pellicanò dagli Imerti che prima del fatto sancirono un'alleanza tramite il matrimonio del capobastone Antonio Imerti e Giuseppina Condello appartenente all'omonima 'ndrina scoppia la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta .

descriptions: De Stefano fought against Condello-Imerti alliance in second war.
edges.evidence_quote: The bloody six-year war between the Condello -Imerti clan and De Stefano allied with the Tegano clan caused 621 deaths.

descriptions: Condello were underbosses of De Stefano before the war.
edges.evidence_quote: A second 'Ndrangheta war was triggered by the marriage between Giuseppina Condello – the sister of the Condello brothers, underbosses of De Stefano – and Antonio Imerti

descriptions: Imerti allied with Condello through marriage in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1983 si alleano con i Condello , sottoposti dei De Stefano , tramite il matrimonio del capobastone Antonio Imerti e Giuseppina Condello appartenente all' omonima 'ndrina .

descriptions: Condello is listed as an allied 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Condello

descriptions: The Condello clan allied with the Imerti during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: Con gli Imerti si schierano i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino

descriptions: Libri is allied with Condello.
edges.evidence_quote: I Libri sono una 'ndrina tra le più potenti di tutta Reggio Calabria alleata dei De Stefano , dei Condello e dei Tegano .

descriptions: Lo Giudice allied with Condello during the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta i Lo Giudice si schierarono con gli Imerti - Condello - Serraino - Rosmini .

descriptions: The Parrello and Condello are allied in the feud against Gallico.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello

descriptions: The Pino and Sena exchanged favors with the Condello and Fontana 'ndrine.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 agosto 1983 a Scalea vengono uccisi taluni Geria e Saffioti come scambio di favori alle 'ndrine del reggino di Pasquale Condello e Giovanni Fontana

descriptions: The Pino and Sena exchanged favors with the Condello and Fontana 'ndrine.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 agosto 1983 a Scalea vengono uccisi taluni Geria e Saffioti come scambio di favori alle 'ndrine del reggino di Pasquale Condello e Giovanni Fontana

descriptions: The Serraino sided with the Condello during the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i Condello - Imerti - Rosmini .

Quality Street Gang.description: The Quality Street Gang operated in Manchester, England, in the 1960s, 1970s and 1980s. Some senior police officers considered them instigators of major crime, but others maintain they were merely a social friendship group. No member was ever arrested or convicted, leading to doubts about their criminal nature. The group was named after a TV advertisement for Quality Street confectionery.

descriptions: The Noonan family participated in a truce that included the Quality Street Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Other gangland figures participating in this truce were Paul Massey, Damian Noonan, Paul Flannery and apparently Jimmy 'the Weed' Donnelly, who was a prominent figure in the Quality Street Gang, another Manchester gang.

descriptions: Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf formed an alliance during the prison riots.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang retaliated against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf convicts

descriptions: Sigue Sigue Commandos are described as the most ardent rival of Sigue Sigue Sputnik.
edges.evidence_quote: the other one being Sigue Sigue Commandos, who are the Sputnik's most ardent rival.

descriptions: During the 2020 New Bilibid Prison riots, Sputniks fought against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang retaliated against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf convicts

New Irish Republican Army.description: Irish republican paramilitary group formed in 2012 from a merger of the Real IRA, Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD), and other small militant groups. It is the largest dissident republican group, active mainly in Northern Ireland, and has launched attacks against British security forces. The group is designated as a terrorist organization by the United States.

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: The New IRA is listed as a rival of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: New IRA

descriptions: Continuity IRA is listed as an ally of New IRA in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Continuity IRA

descriptions: Kinahan cartel killed a New IRA member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Gardaí suspected Barr was shot dead because it was believed by the Kinahan cartel that he had provided a 'safe house' to one of the gunmen in the Regency Hotel attack.

descriptions: New IRA is a continuation of Real IRA after merger with RAAD.
edges.evidence_quote: It is a continuation of the Real Irish Republican Army (Real IRA), which began to be called the 'New IRA' in July 2012 when Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups merged with it.

descriptions: RAAD merged with Real IRA to form New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: It is a continuation of the Real Irish Republican Army (Real IRA), which began to be called the 'New IRA' in July 2012 when Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups merged with it.

descriptions: IRA trained FARC members in bomb-making and received drug proceeds in exchange.
edges.evidence_quote: Their report alleged a longstanding connection between the IRA and FARC–EP, mentioned at least 15 IRA members who had been travelling in and out of Colombia since 1998, and estimated that the IRA had received at least $2 million in drug proceeds for training FARC–EP members.

descriptions: Saoradh is the political wing of New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: It is widely considered that Saoradh is the political wing of the New IRA.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with RAAD and other groups to form the New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: RAAD, 'the IRA', and some smaller groups merged with the Real IRA in 2012 to form the New IRA.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with RAAD and other groups to form the New IRA in July 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA. This new entity was named the New IRA by the media

descriptions: RAAD merged with the Real IRA to form the New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: RAAD, 'the IRA', and some smaller groups merged with the Real IRA in 2012 to form the New IRA.

descriptions: Ghetto Brothers attempted to negotiate a truce with Seven Immortals.
edges.evidence_quote: On December 2, 1971, Cornell Benjamin, known as "Black Benjie", a former heroin addict turned community activist who had joined the Bronx gang the Ghetto Brothers and become their minister of peace, led a delegation to meet with members of rival gangs the Mongols, the Savage Skulls, and the Seven Immortals in order to negotiate a truce.

descriptions: The Savage Nomads engaged in running battles with the Seven Immortals.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was involved in a number of running battles with rival gangs Seven Immortals, Savage Skulls , and the Dirty Dozen.

descriptions: Savage Skulls had running battles with Seven Immortals.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang ... was also involved in a number of running battles with rival gangs, including the Seven Immortals, Savage Nomads, and Dirty Dozen.

descriptions: SLM (Tambour) has been an opponent of RSF since 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SLM (Tambour) (from 2023)

descriptions: Oil Regiment employees are Kadyrovites, indicating Oil Regiment is part of Kadyrovites.
edges.evidence_quote: According to some sources, Umarov's father, Khamad Umarov, was kidnapped back on 5 May 2008, by the Kadyrovite employees of the Oil Regiment (Neftepolk) headed by Chechnya's First Deputy Prime Minister Adam Delimkhanov.

descriptions: Islamic Jihad Union is allied to Al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: The Islamic Jihad Union which is allied to Al-Qaeda.

descriptions: Islamic Jihad Union is allied with al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: The following are presently believed to be allied with al-Qaeda: - Islamic Jihad Union

descriptions: Islamic Jihad Union is a non-state ally of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies ... Islamic Jihad Union

Comando Classe A.description: Brazilian criminal faction originating in Altamira, Pará, founded around 2018. It emerged from prison disputes, breaking from Comando Vermelho and allying with PCC. Active in drug trafficking, homicides, and prison control, with operations in Pará and Amazonian drug routes. Maintains ties with Colombian cartels and former FARC members.

descriptions: B13 is listed as an ally of CCA in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , FTA , B13 cartéis colombianos

descriptions: CCA broke away from Comando Vermelho, indicating a split.
edges.evidence_quote: rompendo com o Comando Vermelho e formando uma aliança com o PCC

descriptions: CCA and PCC fought against CV in a prison rebellion.
edges.evidence_quote: Em julho de 2019, uma rebelião ... O confronto foi entre membros do CCA/PCC e o CV.

descriptions: FTA is listed as an ally of CCA in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , FTA , B13 cartéis colombianos

descriptions: CCA maintains close relations with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: O grupo surgiu por volta de 2018 e mantém relações próximas com o PCC

descriptions: CCA is involved with former FARC members.
edges.evidence_quote: O CCA estaria envolvido com cartéis da Colômbia e ex-integrantes das FARC

descriptions: Família Terror do Amapá lists CCA as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , TCP , CCA

descriptions: Comando Classe A é aliado do PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: massacre executado pela facção Comando Classe A, então aliada recente do PCC, contra o CV.

descriptions: Grande Aracri allied with Vrenna-Bonaventura.
edges.evidence_quote: the 'ndrina allied with other groups, in particular with the Vrenna-Bonaventura 'ndrina

Sonora Cartel.description: The Sonora Cartel was a Mexican drug trafficking organization founded in 1987 by Miguel Caro Quintero and Rafael Caro Quintero, operating primarily in northern Mexico and the southwestern United States. It was considered one of the oldest and best-established cartels by the DEA, with direct links to Colombian cartels. The cartel was acquired by the Sinaloa Cartel by 2007 and reported defunct by 2010.

descriptions: Colima Cartel listed as allied with Sonora Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Guadalajara Cartel Milenio Cartel Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Sonora Cartel is listed as an ally of Guadalajara Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tijuana Cartel , Medellín Cartel , Cali Cartel , Norte del Valle Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel , Juárez Cartel , Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Sonora Cartel is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the cartel's sub-groups and allies are known to consist of ... Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Sonora Cartel became a branch of Sinaloa Cartel by 2006.
edges.evidence_quote: The Milenio (Michoacán) , Jalisco (Guadalajara), Sonora (Sonora) , and Colima cartels were now branches of the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Sonora Cartel received cocaine shipments from the Cali Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sonora Cartel is believed to be one of the earliest cartels to begin shipping cocaine from Colombia , particularly from the Cali Cartel .

descriptions: Cali Cartel is listed as an ally of the Sonora Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Guadalajara Cartel

descriptions: Medellin Cartel is listed as an ally of the Sonora Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Guadalajara Cartel

descriptions: Guadalajara Cartel is listed as an ally of the Sonora Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Guadalajara Cartel

descriptions: Sonora Cartel originated from the Guadalajara Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sonora cartel's roots are in the Guadalajara Cartel, which dissolved after the 1989 arrest of its co-founder, Miguel Ángel Félix Gallardo .

descriptions: Leaders of the disintegrated Sonora Cartel were incorporated into the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Upon the cartel's disintegration, its leaders were incorporated into the Tijuana Cartel and Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Sonora Cartel became a branch of the Sinaloa Cartel by 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: By 2007, the Sonora Cartel, Colima Cartel , and Milenio Cartel became branches of the Sinaloa Cartel .

descriptions: Leaders of the disintegrated Sonora Cartel were incorporated into the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Upon the cartel's disintegration, its leaders were incorporated into the Tijuana Cartel and Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: The Figliomeni clan is part of the Toronto-area Siderno Group.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toronto-area Siderno group has included the ... Figliomeni ... crime families

descriptions: Gente Nueva Del Jaguar is listed as an enemy of La Línea in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Gente Nueva Del Jaguar

descriptions: La Línea está en una batalla sangrienta con Gente Nueva del Jaguar.
edges.evidence_quote: están enfrentando una batalla sangrienta entre La Linea y Gente Nueva del Jaguar

descriptions: Infobox lists Pinoy Real as a rival of Bahala Na Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Satanas , Bahala Na Barkada , Pinoy Real

descriptions: Lost Souls was founded by expelled members of Black Diamond Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: The expelled Black Diamond Riders founded what journalist Jerry Langton called the "rather forlornly named" Lost Souls Motorcycle Club of Milton.

descriptions: Lost Souls merged into Satan's Choice.
edges.evidence_quote: Instead of rejoining the Black Diamond Riders, Satan's Choice to made a better offer, leading for the Lost Souls to join Satan's Choice on 13 April 1996.

People's Aman Committee.description: The People's Aman Committee was a Pakistani political party-affiliated militant group and organized crime gang based in Lyari, Karachi, founded in 2008 by Rehman Dakait. It engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and gang wars, supporting the Pakistan People's Party. The group was officially banned in 2011 but continued de facto operations until the late 2010s.

descriptions: The PAC and Arshad Pappu gang are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Arshad Pappu gang , MQM

descriptions: PAC was renamed to RYO.
edges.evidence_quote: the PAC's name was changed to Revenge Youth Organisation (RYO).

descriptions: Palamara, through Sculli, are active in illegal betting alongside Albanian and Bosnian criminals who support the Emmanuello family.
edges.evidence_quote: A Genova sono stanziati gli alleati Palamara e che tramite il nipote del Morabito Giuseppe Sculli , sono attivi in particolar modo nel totonero insieme a malavitosi albanesi e bosniaci come Safet Altic, spalleggiatori delle famiglie siciliane Fiandaca, Morso, Rinzivillo e Emmanuello di Gela .

descriptions: Cosa Nostra clans Fidanzati and Emmanuello obtained drugs from 'Ndrangheta in 2009.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2009 i siciliani si rivolgono nuovamente alle 'ndrine per rifornirsi di droga, i Fidanzati di Palermo e gli Emmanuello di Gela prendevano la droga colombiana spedita attraverso i porti di Anversa e Amburgo.

descriptions: Sons of Silence had a physical conflict with Iron Order Motorcycle Club in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: Sons of Silence members had a conflict with members of the Iron Order Motorcycle Club in a business parking lot in Crawfordsville on April 27, 2014.

Barriox13.description: Barriox13 is a highly active Sureños street gang based in South Los Angeles, founded in the early 1970s near El Segundo Boulevard and San Pedro Street. The gang is divided into West Side and East Side factions, with over 5,000 members loyal to the Mexican Mafia. It is involved in narcotics, homicide, drug and human trafficking, and has expanded into Southern California and Mexico.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with 135th St Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has had conflicts with several rivals, including Piru gangs such as CPP, WSP, and 135th St Piru, although tensions have recently calmed.

descriptions: Barriox13 has clashed with Campanella Park Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: It has also clashed with black gangs such as the Campanella Park Piru, 135th St Piru, and West Side Piru, although it has an alliance with Gardena 13 and the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with CPP.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has had conflicts with several rivals, including Piru gangs such as CPP, WSP, and 135th St Piru, although tensions have recently calmed.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with CV Largo36.
edges.evidence_quote: Barriox13 remains active in its original territory and maintains conflicts with other Hispanic gangs, including CV155st, CV Largo36, CV117st, and others from Compton and South Central.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with CV117st.
edges.evidence_quote: Barriox13 remains active in its original territory and maintains conflicts with other Hispanic gangs, including CV155st, CV Largo36, CV117st, and others from Compton and South Central.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with CV155st.
edges.evidence_quote: Barriox13 remains active in its original territory and maintains conflicts with other Hispanic gangs, including CV155st, CV Largo36, CV117st, and others from Compton and South Central.

descriptions: Barriox13 has an alliance with Gardena 13.
edges.evidence_quote: It has also clashed with black gangs such as the Campanella Park Piru, 135th St Piru, and West Side Piru, although it has an alliance with Gardena 13 and the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Barriox13 is loyal to the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Originally, the gang formed for self-protection and has remained loyal to the Mexican Mafia prison gang.

descriptions: Barriox13 has clashed with West Side Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: It has also clashed with black gangs such as the Campanella Park Piru, 135th St Piru, and West Side Piru, although it has an alliance with Gardena 13 and the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with WSP.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has had conflicts with several rivals, including Piru gangs such as CPP, WSP, and 135th St Piru, although tensions have recently calmed.

descriptions: B13 is listed as an ally of CCA in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , FTA , B13 cartéis colombianos

descriptions: PCC financed B13 as a proxy against CV.
edges.evidence_quote: the PCC embarked on an aggressive expansion campaign by absorbing less organized gangs and financing local groups to operate as proxies against the CV across the country, such as the B13 gang in Acre

descriptions: American Marines is a splinter group of Baghdad Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Other splinter groups include ChinaSquadNyalenda Base, Chief Squad, Nyamasaria Massive, Kenda Kenda, Kondele Baghdad for Peace, Karamojong Boys, Saba Saba, Artur Margaryan, Kebago, and American Marines.
